landing.heroTitle: Premium UAE vehicles. Inspected, auctioned, delivered to Europe.
landing.heroSubtitle: Inspected by our UAE field teams, auctioned to verified European trade buyers, and shipped door-to-door. The fastest way to source GCC inventory.
landing.featuresTitle: Source GCC inventory without the friction
landing.feature1Body: Our UAE inspectors visit every car in person. 200-point report, full damage map, OEM service history check.
landing.feature2Body: Timed English auctions with proxy bidding, anti-snipe extensions and live bidder dashboards.
landing.feature3Body: Every buyer is KYC and trade-licence verified. No tyre-kickers, no fake bids.
landing.feature4Body: Sea freight, customs and delivery to your gate quoted up-front and bookable in one click.
landing.feature5Body: Hammer price + flat fee + shipping. No hidden BCA-style margins, no last-minute surprises.
landing.feature6Body: CMR, CoC where available, T1, customs export — all handled before the car leaves Jebel Ali.
landing.howTitle: From sand to forecourt in 21 days
landing.howStep1Body: Owner submits the car. Our team visits within 48h, photographs every panel, scans the VIN and writes a full condition report.
landing.howStep2Body: Cars go live in scheduled English auctions. Place proxy bids or watch the action live. Win or pass — never any obligation.
landing.howStep3Body: Pay once you win. We collect, clear customs, ship roll-on / roll-off or container, and deliver to your address.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to bid on your first GCC car?
landing.ctaBody: Register a trade account in two minutes. Approved overnight, bidding the next day.

admin.dashboardSubtitle: What's running across the UAE → EU pipeline today.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Help with bidding, payments, shipping and your account.
support.contactIntro: Reach our team for help with your account, a purchase, or a shipment.
support.q1a: UAE field teams inspect privately owned vehicles and list them in timed online auctions. Registered European buyers place bids until the timer ends; the highest qualifying bid above the reserve wins.
support.q2a: Each bid must beat the current bid by at least the minimum increment. You can set a maximum (proxy) bid and we will bid on your behalf up to that amount. All bids are binding.
support.q3a: After winning you have 36 hours to confirm payment and upload proof of transfer. Once confirmed, you have 5 working days to complete the wire transfer. Late or missing payment may incur charges.
support.q4a: Warehouse pickup in Dubai, RoRo or container shipping to major EU ports, and optional door-to-door delivery. German Registration (TÜV) is available as an add-on service.
support.q5q: Who pays customs duties and VAT?
support.q5a: All import costs, including customs duties and VAT, are the responsibility of the buyer and are not included in our fees or shipping costs.
support.q6q: What is KYC and why is it required?
support.q6a: Know Your Customer (KYC) verification confirms your identity and company details before you can bid. It protects all parties in cross-border vehicle transactions.
support.q7q: How do I create an account and get verified?
support.q7a: Register with your email and company details, then submit the requested verification documents. Our team reviews submissions and notifies you once your account is approved.
support.q8q: How do I get help with a specific vehicle or order?
support.q8a: Email us with the vehicle or invoice reference and our team will assist you.
support.ctaBody: Email our support team and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

privacy.translationNotice: Translations are provided for convenience. In case of discrepancy, the English version governs.
privacy.legalNotice: This document describes the platform's policy and is not legal advice.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how XportACar collects, uses and protects personal data when you use our website, mobile apps and related services.
privacy.contactFooter: Questions? Email support@xportacar.com or write to Global Business Consultancy L.L.C-FZ, Meydan Grandstand, 6th floor, Meydan Road, Nad Al Sheba, Dubai, UAE.
privacy.s1Body: XportACar is a brand operated by Global Business Consultancy L.L.C-FZ, registered in the Meydan Free Zone, Dubai, UAE (trade licence 2534919.01), at Meydan Grandstand, 6th floor, Meydan Road, Nad Al Sheba, Dubai, UAE. 'We', 'us' and 'our' refer to this entity as the controller of personal data processed through the platform.
privacy.s2Body:
We collect personal data when you create an account, complete KYC, place bids, win and pay for vehicles, or contact support. We also receive limited technical data from your device.

- Account: name, email, phone, company details (if applicable), country, preferred language.
- KYC: passport or driving licence and, for business buyers, company registration documents.
- Transaction: bids, watchlist entries, invoices, payment proofs.
- Inspector-uploaded content: vehicle photos and supporting documents.
- Technical: device identifiers, push tokens, app/browser version, session logs.
- Communications: messages and attachments you send to support.
privacy.s3Body: We use this data to operate the platform, verify your identity, process bids and payment proofs, arrange shipping and customs, send service messages, prevent fraud, and comply with applicable laws.
privacy.s4Body:
For users in the EU/EEA we rely on GDPR Article 6 bases:

- Contract — to register your account, run the auction, take payment proofs and arrange shipping.
- Legal obligation — records required by tax, anti-money-laundering and other laws.
- Legitimate interest — fraud prevention, security and service improvement (you may object — see 'Your rights').
- Consent — for optional marketing emails. You can withdraw consent at any time.
privacy.s5Body:
We do not sell personal data. We share it with the service providers that run the platform:

- Supabase — authentication, database and storage hosting.
- Vercel — website hosting.
- Apple — distribution of our mobile apps (App Store / TestFlight).
- Expo — push notifications and over-the-air JS updates for the mobile apps.
- auto.dev — vehicle reference data and market valuations.

Planned but not yet integrated: Stripe (payments) and Resend (email). We will update this policy before introducing them. We may also share data where required by law or to protect users.
privacy.s6Body: XportACar operates between the UAE and the EU, so personal data is necessarily transferred between these regions. Where transfers leave the EEA, we rely on appropriate safeguards (e.g. Standard Contractual Clauses) where required by the GDPR. The UAE Federal Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL) applies in parallel for UAE-based users.
privacy.s7Body:
We keep data only as long as needed:

- Account: while active, plus up to 24 months after closure (unless longer is required by law).
- KYC: typically 5 years after the last transaction, per anti-money-laundering rules.
- Transactions and invoices: 7 years for tax/accounting.
- Support communications: 24 months after the last contact.
- Technical logs: up to 12 months.

After these periods, data is deleted or anonymised.
privacy.s9Body: Our website uses cookies that are strictly necessary to keep you signed in and to remember language and currency. We do not use third-party analytics or advertising trackers, and our mobile apps do not perform cross-app tracking.
privacy.s10Body: The platform is for adult business and consumer buyers. We do not knowingly collect data from anyone under 18. If you believe a minor has used the platform, contact us so we can delete the account and related data.
privacy.s11Body: We protect personal data with HTTPS encryption in transit, role-based database access, row-level security policies, signed URLs for sensitive uploads and a human KYC review. No system is perfectly secure, but we follow industry-standard measures and review them regularly.
privacy.s12Body: If we discover a personal-data breach likely to result in a high risk to your rights, we will notify the relevant supervisory authority within 72 hours and tell you without undue delay, in line with GDPR Article 34.
privacy.s13Body: Email our data team at support@xportacar.com. We have not yet appointed a Data Protection Officer; once required by law or scale, we will publish DPO contact details here.
privacy.s14Body: Where the GDPR requires an EU representative under Article 27, we will publish their name and contact details here. This appointment is pending and will be in place before we actively market the service to consumers in the EU.
privacy.s15Body: You have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority. For EU users, this is the data-protection authority in your country of residence.
privacy.s16Body: For any privacy question, email support@xportacar.com or write to Global Business Consultancy L.L.C-FZ, Meydan Grandstand, 6th floor, Meydan Road, Nad Al Sheba, Dubai, UAE.
privacy.s17Body: We may update this policy as the platform evolves or as required by law. Material changes will be announced in the apps and on the website. The current version date is shown at the top of this page.

terms.translationNotice: Translations are provided for convenience. In case of discrepancy, the English version governs.
terms.legalNotice: This document describes the platform's policy and is not legal advice.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of the XportACar website, mobile apps and related services. By creating an account or using the platform you agree to these terms.
terms.contactFooter: For questions about these Terms, email support@xportacar.com.
terms.s1Body: By creating an account or using XportACar's website or mobile apps, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the service.
terms.s2Body: You must be at least 18 years old to register. Before bidding, you must complete Know-Your-Customer (KYC) verification by submitting identity documents and, for business buyers, company registration documents. We may refuse, suspend or revoke accounts that fail verification or breach these terms.
terms.s3Body: XportACar is open to businesses (B2B) and consumers (B2C). If you act as a consumer resident in the EU/EEA, mandatory consumer protections under EU law — including Directive 2011/83/EU and statutory warranty rules — apply and cannot be waived by these terms. Where you act as a business, the B2B provisions of these terms apply.
terms.s4Body: Listings are invitations to bid, not binding offers from the seller. Once placed, a bid is binding on you for the duration of the auction. You may set a maximum (proxy) bid; the system will bid for you up to that limit. Reserve prices are not disclosed; a vehicle sells only if the highest bid meets or exceeds the reserve. Buy-Now, where offered, ends the auction immediately at the listed price.
terms.s5Body:
After you win:

- You have 36 hours to confirm payment in the app and upload proof of transfer.
- Once confirmed, you have 5 working days to complete the bank wire.
- XportACar charges a 2.9% platform fee on the hammer price.
- Late or missing payment may incur charges, may result in the vehicle being re-listed and may lead to account suspension.
terms.s6Body: All import costs — customs duties, VAT and any other import-related taxes or charges — are the buyer's responsibility and are not included in the platform fee or shipping cost. The buyer is responsible for compliance with import regulations in the country of import.
terms.s7Body: XportACar arranges shipping through partner carriers based on the option you select: warehouse pickup in Dubai, RoRo to a nominated EU port, container shipping or door-to-door delivery. Optional German Registration (TÜV) can be added (currently €3,500). Shipping costs are quoted at checkout and paid as part of the invoice.
terms.s8Body: Risk in the vehicle passes from XportACar (or the seller) to the buyer when the vehicle is handed to the carrier nominated for the chosen shipping option, or — for warehouse pickup — when the vehicle is collected by the buyer or their agent. Insurance during transit is the buyer's responsibility unless purchased as an add-on.
terms.s9Body: Vehicles are pre-owned. Our inspectors document each vehicle to the best of their ability — photographs, recorded damage, paint-thickness readings and mileage. Inspection reports document the condition observed at the time of inspection and are not a manufacturer's warranty or a guarantee of fitness for any particular purpose.
terms.s10Body:
For B2B buyers: vehicles are sold as used; we expressly exclude implied warranties of merchantability and fitness for purpose to the maximum extent permitted by applicable law. You must notify us in writing within 14 days of delivery of any material defect that was not documented in the inspection report, with photographic evidence. We will review and propose a fair resolution.

For consumer (B2C) buyers in the EU/EEA: statutory consumer warranties under your local law apply and are not affected by this clause. Nothing in these terms limits any consumer right that cannot be waived under applicable law.
terms.s11Body: These terms are governed by the laws of the United Arab Emirates. Disputes are subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of the Dubai Free Zones (the DIFC Courts where applicable), except where mandatory consumer-protection rules entitle an EU consumer to bring proceedings in the courts of their habitual residence.
terms.s12Body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, XportACar's total liability arising out of or in connection with the platform or a vehicle purchase is limited to the platform fee actually paid for the transaction concerned. We are not liable for indirect or consequential losses, including loss of profit. Nothing in this clause limits liability that cannot be limited under applicable law, including liability for fraud or for personal injury caused by negligence.
terms.s13Body: The XportACar name, logo, website, apps and content (other than user-uploaded content and third-party material) are owned by Global Business Consultancy L.L.C-FZ. You may not copy, scrape, modify or redistribute platform content without our prior written consent.
terms.s15Body: We may suspend or close an account for breach of these terms, failure to complete KYC, repeated non-payment, suspected fraud or any other lawful reason. You may close your account at any time by contacting support; some data may be retained as set out in the Privacy Policy.
terms.s16Body: We may update these terms as the platform evolves or as required by law. Material changes will be announced in the apps or by email. Continuing to use the platform after changes take effect means you accept them.
terms.s17Body: Neither party is liable for delays in or failure to perform caused by events beyond reasonable control, including natural disasters, regulatory action, carrier failures, port closures or major outages of third-party infrastructure.
terms.s18Body: If any provision of these terms is held invalid or unenforceable by a competent court, the remaining provisions remain in full effect.
terms.s19Body: These terms are governed by the laws of the United Arab Emirates. Mandatory consumer-protection rules of your country of residence (where applicable) continue to apply alongside this clause.
terms.s20Body: Questions about these terms? Email support@xportacar.com or write to Global Business Consultancy L.L.C-FZ, Meydan Grandstand, 6th floor, Meydan Road, Nad Al Sheba, Dubai, UAE.

deleteAccount.warning: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data.
